## Evidence Boundary

This catalog is a routing substrate for public finance, trading, and Web3 MCP/API/tool surfaces. It records official or high-quality sources and default safety posture, but it does not prove live availability, entitlement, API-key validity, market-data correctness, or trading performance. Live-check source docs before install or exact capability claims.
